final:
module temperature_monitor(
    input [3:0] temperature,
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2:0] obf_alarm
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            obf_alarm <= 3'b000;
        end else begin
            if (temperature > 4'b1010) begin // If temperature > 10
                obf_alarm <= 3'b111; // Set obf_alarm
            end else begin
                obf_alarm <= 3'b000; // Clear obf_alarm
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
